ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reservoirs" (
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservoir */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reservoir */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the reservoir */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the reservoir (volume) */,
  "current_level" REAL /* Current water level in the reservoir (volume) */,
  "min_level" REAL /* Minimum allowed water level in the reservoir (volume) */,
  "max_level" REAL /* Maximum allowed water level in the reservoir (volume) */,
  "spillway_capacity" REAL /* Spillway capacity of the reservoir (volume) */,
  "dam_height" REAL /* Height of the dam (meters) */,
  "drainage_area" REAL /* Drainage area of the reservoir (square kilometers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservoir associated with the location */,
  "volume_constraint" REAL /* Volume constraint for the location (volume) */,
  "environmental_constraint" TEXT /* Environmental constraint for the location (e.g., water quality standards) */,
  "population_served" INTEGER /* Population served by the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., objective function coefficient, RHS constraint coefficient) */,
  "dimension" INTEGER /* Dimension of the parameter (e.g., 1 for scalar, 2 for matrix) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of values in the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter value */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter associated with the value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objective_function_coefficients" (
  "coefficient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coefficient */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter associated with the coefficient */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the coefficient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coefficient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objective_function_coefficients_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rhs_constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter associated with the constraint */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator used in the constraint (e.g., >=, <=) */,
  "rhs" REAL /* Right-hand side value of the constraint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rhs_constraints_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inflows" (
  "inflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inflow */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservoir associated with the inflow */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the inflow */,
  "inflow" REAL /* Amount of water inflowing to the reservoir (volume) */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the inflow (e.g., standard deviation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inflows_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., water resource manager, engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scenario (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario associated with the result */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the optimization model (e.g., objective function value) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_results_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_treatment_plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the plant (volume) */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used by the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality measurement */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservoir associated with the measurement */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water treatment plant associated with the measurement */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter measured (e.g., pH, turbidity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES water_treatment_plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hydrological_data" (
  "hydrological_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hydrological data point */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservoir associated with the data point */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation at the reservoir (mm) */,
  "evaporation" REAL /* Evaporation from the reservoir (mm) */,
  "runoff" REAL /* Runoff from the reservoir (mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hydrological_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrological_data_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption data point */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water treatment plant associated with the data point */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy consumed (e.g., electricity, diesel) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed (kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES water_treatment_plants ("plant_id")
)
